Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.keyshortcuts

Class KeyStrokeSettings

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractPropertiesSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.keyshortcuts.KeyStrokeSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
public class KeyStrokeSettings extends AbstractPropertiesSettings
Class for storing and retrieving KeyStrokes. If possible, define the keyboard shortcuts in the static block here. By that, it is easier to detect and prevent possible duplicates. In addition, be careful to avoid combinations that are used by the docking framework, such as Ctrl+E or Ctrl+M.
